title: fallopia × heterocarpa
intro: Fallopia × heterocarpa, also known as Japanese fleece flower or fleeceflower, is a hybrid plant species that results from the cross between Japanese fleece flower (Fallopia japonica) and Giant Himalayan fleece flower (Fallopia sachalinensis). The medicinal properties of Fallopia × heterocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Fallopia × heterocarpa include supporting digestion, alleviating symptoms of menopause, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Fallopia × heterocarpa include teas, infusions, and dried flowers that can be used to create a variety of medicinal products.
